name: Hot Cherry Fruit Compote
recipeInstructions:
1. In a buttered, large glass baking dish (9 X 13 inches or larger), arrange the Bing cherries, Royal Ann cherries, peach slices, pineapple chunks, orange sections, raisins, and ginger evenly.
2. Sprinkle grated lemon rind over all of the fruit mixture.
3. Make a paste by combining melted butter, brown sugar, and curry powder (if using). Distribute this mixture evenly over the fruit.
4. Cover with cherry pie filling and pour rum (or gelatin) over all.
5. Bake in an oven preheated to 350°F for 45 minutes, or until hot and bubbly. Serve hot as an accompaniment to meat or poultry, or chilled as a dessert.
